title: Find Funding for Your Innovative Ideas – Protect Nature Challenge - Canada.ca
content:
## Find Funding for Your Innovative Ideas – Protect Nature Challenge
Some ideas are bigger than we can take on by ourselves. If you or your organization are looking for funding for innovative environmental projects, the Government of Canada may have some financial guidance for you.
Our environment funding includes programs such as
- Aboriginal Fund for Species at Risk
- Atlantic Ecosystems Initiatives
- Community Interaction Program
- Community Nominated Priority Places for Species at Risk
- EcoAction Community Funding Program
- Environmental Damages Fund
- Great Lakes Protection Initiative
- Habitat Stewardship Program
- Increasing Knowledge on Plastic Pollution Initiative
- Lake Winnipeg Basin Program
- Low Carbon Economy Fund
- Zero Plastic Waste Initiative
The new Climate Action and Awareness Fund supports Canadian-made projects that help to reduce Canada’s greenhouse gas emissions.
If you own ecologically sensitive land or know someone who does, one way to protect these lands forever is through the Ecological Gifts Program .

## Let’s do this together
Share these challenges with your friends and family and show us what you are doing by tagging us in your social media messages and by using the hashtag #ProtectNature.
We’re on Instagram @canenvironment , Facebook @EnvironmentandClimateChange and Twitter @environmentca .
Check out our list of challenges to help protect nature.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
